# init(string:)

**Initializer**

Creates an attachment containing the provided string.

## Declaration

```swift
convenience init(string: String)
```

## Parameters

- **string**: The string to wrap as an attachment.

## Discussion

Creates an attachment with a [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTAttachment/uniformTypeIdentifier] of `"``public.plain-text"`.
